reviews.text:
Had an awful experience at this clinic.

In response to the clinic’s reply: my appointment was in winter 2024, not three …

After our first visit we really rated Grosvenor Gardens. From there we decided we would like to pay for a NIPT exam. On the brochure it states that these exams can be done at the earliest 9 weeks but it is recommended to do them a bit later …

Please read before you go. Her response is utterly false.

I came for a scan with Dr. Tezcan, who delivered bad news in a blunt and …

I begged her to talk on the phone. I paid 500£ for my consultation including blood tests and ultrasound scan, the only thing I got from her is a mail saying that I should increase the dose of my medicine. I wanted to talk with her on the …
